creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Hannes Hauswedell from comment #4)

> Because base compiler and most others are now c++14 safe?

I think so. Also, we only need it to work on 10/11/12, I verified and it works on these systems. So c++14-lang isn't practically important.

---

What I also don't understand is why USES=compiler:openmp always switches to gcc. clang does support OpenMP. And clang also builds seqan-apps fine. But USES=compiler:openmp here is fine.
